Agenda

Three Days of Inspiration

Day 1
Dec 10
The Future of Work
  • Opening Keynote: Workforce 2030
  • Panel: AI in Scheduling & Payroll
  • Workshop: Compliance Best Practices
  • Networking Reception
Day 2
Dec 11
Technology & Innovation
  • Keynote: Real-Time Workforce Analytics
  • Product Deep Dive: SpykApps 3.0
  • Case Studies: Enterprise Implementation
  • Hackathon: Build the Future
Day 3
Dec 12
People & Culture
  • Keynote: Employee Experience at Scale
  • Workshop: Retention Strategies
  • Panel: Diversity in Scheduling
  • Closing Ceremony & Awards
